query:
-- Update all giveaway posts captions and image URL
UPDATE posts 
SET 
  caption_en = '🎉 GIVEAWAY TIME! WIN A FREE DOUBLE SCOOP of Local Artisan Ice Cream at Sopris Restaurant!

To enter:
❤️ FOLLOW @SoprisRestaurant
🔁 SHARE THIS POST
🏷️ TAG A FRIEND in the comments below!

Winner announced at the end of the month! Good luck everyone! 🍀

Inside 4 Jacks Casino • Jackpot, NV

This promotion is in no way sponsored, endorsed, or administered by, or associated with Facebook.',
  caption_es = '🎉 ¡TIEMPO DE SORTEO! ¡GANA UNA BOLA DOBLE GRATIS de Helado Artesanal Local en Sopris Restaurant!

Para participar:
❤️ SIGUE a @SoprisRestaurant
🔁 COMPARTE ESTA PUBLICACIÓN
🏷️ ETIQUETA A UN AMIGO en los comentarios!

¡El ganador se anuncia al final del mes! ¡Buena suerte a todos! 🍀

Dentro de 4 Jacks Casino • Jackpot, NV',
  image_url = 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_giveaway_post-5pEzW2VmrSqKpDxh6HKFCq.png'
WHERE post_type = 'promotion' 
  AND caption_en LIKE '%GIVEAWAY%WIN A FREE MEAL%';

-- Update all check-in posts captions and image URL
UPDATE posts 
SET 
  caption_en = '📍 CHECK IN & WIN a FREE Double Scoop of Local Artisan Ice Cream at Sopris Restaurant! 🍦

Dining with us today? Here''s how to enter:
📍 CHECK IN at Sopris Restaurant on Facebook
📸 Tag us in your food photo
🍦 WIN a FREE Double Scoop of Local Artisan Ice Cream!

Winner picked EVERY WEEK! 🎉 The more you check in, the more chances you have to win!

Inside 4 Jacks Casino • Jackpot, NV

This promotion is in no way sponsored, endorsed, or administered by, or associated with Facebook.',
  caption_es = '📍 ¡REGÍSTRATE Y GANA una Bola Doble GRATIS de Helado Artesanal Local en Sopris Restaurant! 🍦

¿Cenando con nosotros hoy? Así es como participas:
📍 REGÍSTRATE en Sopris Restaurant en Facebook
📸 Etiquétanos en tu foto de comida
🍦 ¡GANA una Bola Doble GRATIS de Helado Artesanal Local!

¡Ganador elegido CADA SEMANA! 🎉

Dentro de 4 Jacks Casino • Jackpot, NV',
  image_url = 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/sopris_checkin_post-4e2DYw5GThvQMCFeq9sYny.png'
WHERE post_type = 'promotion' 
  AND caption_en LIKE '%CHECK IN%WIN%meal%';
